title: Security Profile Application Guide for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9

controls.notes: This is a helper rule to reload Dconf database correctly.
controls.title: Reload Dconf Database

controls.notes: The policy doesn't have any section where this would fit better.
controls.title: Enable Authselect
Session Initiation is Audited
controls.original_title: Se auditan los inicios de sesión.

controls.title: Control Who Can Access Security and Audit Logs
controls.original_title: Se controla quien puede acceder a los registros de seguridad y auditoría.

controls.title: System Time Change is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla el cambio de hora del sistema.

controls.title: Control Who Can Generate or Modify Audit Rules
controls.original_title: Se controla quién puede generar o modificar reglas de audit.

controls.notes:
It is not clear the intention of this requirement since there is no definition of these
subcategories. The project has many audit related rules. Clarifying these subcategories
we can select the proper rules.
controls.title: A Detailed Audit Has Been Implemented Based on Subcategories
controls.original_title: Se ha implementado la auditoría detallada basada en subcategorías.

controls.title: At Least 90 Days of Activity Logs Are Guaranteed
controls.original_title: Se garantiza al menos 90 días de registros de actividad.

controls.title: Modifications to the Sudoers File Are Audited, As Are Changes to Permissions, Users, Groups, and Passwords
controls.original_title: Se auditan las modificaciones del fichero sudoers, así como los cambios en permisos, usuarios, grupos y contraseñas.

controls.notes:
Some possible rules were included here but it is not clear if the requirement intends to
check more than these rules. We can see if more related rules are available in the project
and include everything that makes sense in the context of cron and chrony.
controls.title: Changes to Cron Settings and Scheduled Tasks Including Startup Scripts Are Audited
controls.original_title: Se auditan los cambios en la configuración de Cron y en tareas programadas incluyendo los de scripts de inicio.

controls.title: Attempts to Access Critical Items Are Audited
controls.original_title: Se auditan los intentos de acceso a elementos críticos.

controls.notes:
We probably have audit related rule to monitor mount related syscalls, but it is not clear
about the swap. Is the intention to monitor when swap is changed?
controls.title: All Mount Operations on the System and Changes to the Swap Are Audited
controls.original_title: Se audita toda operación de montaje en el sistema y modificaciones en la memoria de intercambio.

controls.notes:
The intention here is probably to audit changes in /etc/pam.d files, but we need to confirm
this assumption and get more context.
controls.title: Modifications in PAM Files Are Audited
controls.original_title: Se auditan modificaciones en ficheros PAM.

controls.notes:
It is a little tricky to interpret this requirement. Assuming the "Common users" are actually
interactive users, this requirement would automatically enforce all admin actions to be
performed only by the root user. I am not sure if this is the intetion here.
controls.title: Common Users Do Dot Have Local Administrator Permissions and Are Not Included in a Sudo Group
controls.original_title: Los usuarios estándar no disponen de permisos de administrador local ni se encuentran incluidos en un grupo sudoer.

controls.notes:
New templated rule is necessary to install the package. But to ensure the chosen antivirus
is actually updated would demand a more complex rule. Maybe this requirement can have at
leastthe partial status after the templated rule.
controls.title: The System Has an Updated Antivirus
controls.original_title: El sistema tiene un antivirus y este está actualizado.

controls.notes: Remaining rules for /boot/efi are not implemented yet.
controls.title: Permissions by Partitions Are Modified
controls.original_title: Se modifican los permisos por particiones.

controls.title: Login and Impersonation Permissions Are Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controlan los permisos de inicio de sesión y suplantación de identidad.

controls.title: Elevation Attempts Are Controlled by Defining Users and Sudoer Groups
controls.original_title: Se controlan los intentos de elevación mediante definición de usuarios y grupos sudoers.

controls.notes: There are rules for ssh_keys, for example. We need to confirm the scope of this requirement
controls.title: Access to Encryption Keys is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla el acceso a las claves de cifrado.

controls.title: Disable Insecure Encryption Algorithms
controls.original_title: Se han deshabilitado los algoritmos de cifrado inseguros.

controls.title: Recurring Password Change is Required
controls.original_title: Se exige el cambio de contraseña de forma recurrente.

controls.title: Secure Protocols Are Used For the Network Authentication Processes
controls.original_title: Se hace uso de protocolos seguros para los procesos de autenticación de red.

controls.title: Network Session Inactivity is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla la inactividad de la sesión de red.

controls.title: Local and Remote Console Inactivity is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla la inactividad de consola local y remota.

controls.title: The Security of Sensitive System Objects is Reinforced
controls.original_title: Se refuerza la seguridad de los objetos sensibles del sistema.

controls.title: Access in Recovery Mode Including Grub Boot Modification Mode is Restricted
controls.original_title: Se restringen accesos en modo recuperación incluido el modo modificación de inicio de grub.

controls.notes: "/sbin/nologin" might be a better option
controls.title: Service Users Shell is Limited to "/bin/false"
controls.original_title: Se limita la shell de usuarios de servicio a "/bin/false".

controls.title: The Use of Sessions With the "root" User is Restricted
controls.original_title: Se restringe el uso de sesiones con usuario "root".

controls.title: The Global System Mask is Modified To Be More Restrictive
controls.original_title: Se modifica la máscara global del sistema para ser más restrictiva.

controls.title: Unnecessary Groups and Users are Removed From the System
controls.original_title: Se eliminan los grupos y usuarios innecesarios del sistema.

controls.title: Control Who Can Install Software on the System
controls.original_title: Se controla quién puede instalar software en el sistema.

controls.title: The Operating System is Updated
controls.original_title: El sistema operativo está actualizado.

controls.title: The System Has an Activated Local Firewall
controls.original_title: El sistema tiene un firewall local activado.

controls.title: Unnecessary Services are Disabled, Reducing the Attack Surface
controls.original_title: Se deshabilitan servicios innecesarios, reduciendo la superficie de exposición.

controls.notes:
This might be related to SELinux or fapolicyd.
We need more context to confirm the intention of this requirement
controls.title: Application Execution is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla la ejecución de aplicaciones.

controls.notes:
These are mentioned to be reviewed but not enforced:
# net.ipv4.icmp_echo_ignore_all = 1
# net.ipv4.tcp_timestamps = 0
# net.ipv4.tcp_max_syn_backlog = 1280
# sysctl_net_ipv6_conf_all_disable_ipv6
# sysctl_net_ipv6_conf_default_disable_ipv6
controls.title: Anti-Ransomware Measures are Enabled
controls.original_title: Se dispone de medidas anti ransomware habilitadas.

controls.title: Password Encrypted Boot That Prevents Modification is Enabled (Protected GRUB)
controls.original_title: Está habilitado el arranque cifrado con contraseña que evite modificaciones (GRUB protegido).

controls.notes:
Is it related to downloads from the Internet to the system or from the system to an external
storage, for example?
controls.title: File Download is Audited
controls.original_title: Se audita la descarga de archivos.

controls.notes: Maybe simply removing the packages is enough.
controls.title: System Compilers are Disabled
controls.original_title: Están deshabilitados los compiladores del sistema.

controls.notes:
Is it related to TTY access, physical access, local users authentication, etc?
It is not not clear the scope.
controls.title: Local Log On To the System is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla el inicio de sesión local en el sistema.

controls.title: The Security of the SSH Protocol is Strengthened
controls.original_title: Se ha reforzado la seguridad del protocolo SSH.

controls.title: A Robust Credential Policy is In Place
controls.original_title: Se dispone de una política de credenciales robusta.

controls.title: During Login, the System Displays a Text in Compliance With the Organization's Standards or Directives
controls.original_title: Durante el inicio de sesión, el sistema muestra un texto en cumplimiento con las normas o directivas de la organización.

controls.title: Network Acess to the System is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla el acceso al sistema a través de la red.

controls.notes: It overlaps the rule in A.5.SEC-RHEL6 requirement
controls.title: Only Strong Encryption Algorithms are Allowed in Accesses to the System
controls.original_title: Sólo se permiten algoritmos de cifrado robustos en accesos al sistema.

controls.title: GUI Idle Time is Limited
controls.original_title: Se limita el tiempo de inactividad del GUI.

controls.notes: It seems to duplicate the A.11.SEC-RHEL4 requirement
controls.title: A Dissuasive Banner is Displayed
controls.original_title: Se muestra un banner disuasorio.

controls.title: The User List is Disabled
controls.original_title: Se deshabilita la lista de usuarios.

controls.notes: New rules might be necessary.
controls.title: File History is Disabled
controls.original_title: Se deshabilita recordar el historial de ficheros.

controls.notes: New rules might be necessary.
controls.title: Key Combination to Launch GTK Inspector is Disabled
controls.original_title: Se deshabilita combinación de teclas para iniciar el inspector GTK

controls.title: Auto-Mounting of Removable Devices on the System is Disabled
controls.original_title: Se deshabilita el auto montaje de dispositivos extraíbles en el sistema.

controls.title: The Use of Removable Storage Media is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla el uso de medios de almacenamiento extraíbles.

controls.notes: More context should be provided to clarify this requirement
controls.title: Access to the Folder and File Tree is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla el acceso al árbol de carpetas y ficheros.

controls.notes: This is already covered by other requirements. Maybe more rules could be included here.
controls.title: Measures Are Applied to Protect Accounts
controls.original_title: Se aplican medidas para la protección de las cuentas.

controls.title: A Robust Algorithm and Password Complexity Are Enabled
controls.original_title: Está habilitado un algoritmo robusto y la complejidad de contraseñas.

controls.title: The Installation And Use of Any Device Connected to the Equipment is Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controla la instalación y uso de cualquier dispositivo conectado al equipo.

controls.notes: It seems to duplicate the A.11.SEC-RHEL12 requirement.
controls.title: The Dynamic Mounting and Unmounting of File Systems is Restricted
controls.original_title: Se restringe el montaje y desmontaje dinámico de sistemas de archivos.

controls.notes: Is it about system limits?
controls.title: Privileges That Affect System Performance Are Controlled
controls.original_title: Se controlan los privilegios que afectan al rendimiento del sistema.

controls.title: Control Who Can Turn Off the System
controls.original_title: Se controla quien puede apagar el sistema.

controls.title: System Disk is Encrypted
controls.original_title: El disco del sistema está cifrado.

controls.notes: The rules in this requirement overlaps the A.25.SEC-RHEL1 requirement
controls.title: The Data Disk is Encrypted
controls.original_title: El disco de datos está cifrado.

controls.title: There Is an Account Lockout Policy for Incorrect Logins
controls.original_title: Existe una política de bloqueo de cuentas ante inicios de sesión incorrectos.
